title: Natural Selection buffs low AL non-effect creatures

card.rawText: Only affects non-effect creatures of AL 5 or less. Atk: +7. Hit: +7.

effect.target: Non-effect creatures with AL 5 or less

plan.title: Natural Selection buffs low AL non-effect creatures
plan.summary: Play Natural Selection as field magic and verify an eligible low-AL non-effect creature receives the printed Atk and Hit bonuses.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 because it has no card effects and base AL 3.

steps: Player 1 plays Natural Selection as field magic.
Run a follow-up battle with the eligible primary creature attacking.
Inspect hit roll modifier and damage dealt.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +7 Atk bonus
Natural Selection remains in magic slot

manualVerification: Confirm creatures with card effects or AL above 5 do not receive this aura.
riskNotes: This fixture validates the positive eligible case for the printed restriction.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Natural Selection field aura for eligible creatures.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
